notes: v0.16.67 — RIFT BRANCH MAP in-game + energy cost icon + mini-boss prototypes. (1) The old 3-tall-cards rift path-select is replaced with BRANCH MAP: a START orb on the left, 3 paths fan out with new procedural node icons inside hex badges (crosshair / skull / tri-skull / cross / hex-chip / triangle / wavy ribbon / arrow ship / ringed orb). Hover brightens the whole branch, click locks it in. (2) The rift open page's energy cost line now draws the real baked energy texture next to the cost and balance, red-tinted when unaffordable. (3) test_mini_boss.tscn ships with 4 live-animated mini-boss prototypes (TURRET CORE / SPLITTER / RAIL SENTINEL / SWARM QUEEN) with an auto-piloted ship dodging each pattern so you can preview the feel. Press 1/2/3/4 to switch. Next pass: HAZARD/SLIPSTREAM/STRAFE arena mockups + MODULE-node reveal popup. Windows only.
